stage_01.reasoning: The failure is a basic connectivity/health failure against the management API and cluster-nodes endpoint (curl exec returning non-zero, not a permission-denied response), not a vhost-permission scoping issue. Stage_02 only touches app-user/ops-user permissions on /app and /ops and explicitly requires the cluster to remain healthy with 3 nodes, so it provides no legitimate reason for the RabbitMQ management API or node connectivity to break -- this points to the agent having damaged cluster health/connectivity, a real regression.
